containerStyle: background-color: #212529 !important; border: 1px solid #343a40; border-radius: 4px; padding: 2px 0; box-shadow: 0 0.5rem 1rem rgba(0,0,0,0.5); width: 150px; font-family: sans-serif; z-index: 100002;
itemStyle: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 15px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8) !important; text-decoration: none !important; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; border-bottom: 1px solid #343a40;
style: display:inline-flex !important; align-items:center !important; justify-content:center !important; cursor:pointer; background:#212529 !important; padding:6px !important; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid #343a40; text-decoration:none !important; margin: 12px 0 5px 10px !important; vertical-align:middle !important; height:24px !important; width:24px !important; box-sizing:border-box !important;
